title: Community Moderation Update — 2026-04-20
body:
We have taken enforcement action against several accounts following reports of spam and harassment.

• Two accounts have been permanently banned: one for distributing phishing links across multiple channels, and one for sustained targeted harassment of new members.
• Two accounts have received formal warnings for policy violations (suspicious automation patterns and off-topic posting).

Reports involving trusted community roles (report_003, report_006) were reviewed and closed as either a moderation disagreement or a coordinated false-report campaign — no action was taken against those members.

We take community safety seriously. If you see something, report it. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports.
